mapper.select: select count(1) from kitchen_post_like where post_id = #{postId} and wx_user_id = #{wxUserId}
mapper.insert: insert into kitchen_post_like(post_id, wx_user_id, create_time) values(#{postId}, #{wxUserId}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from kitchen_post_like where post_id = #{postId} and wx_user_id = #{wxUserId}
